name: Recurly (Subscription Management Platform)

auth.notes: API key passed to client constructor

performance.notes: REST API v3 (OpenAPI spec); webhook-driven billing events

agent_readiness.notes: Subscription management with strong OpenAPI spec. import recurly. client = recurly.Client(api_key). account = client.create_account({'code': 'user_123'}). sub = client.create_subscription({'account': {'code': 'user_123'}, 'plan_code': 'monthly'}). client.list_accounts(params={}).items(). Dunning, prorations, usage-based billing, coupons. Revenue recognition. Stronger enterprise reporting than Chargebee. OpenAPI spec available for SDK generation. Used by Box, Hubspot, ReachMedia.

gotchas: Revenue share (0.9%) adds up at scale vs flat fee
Sandbox environment can have subtle behavior differences from production
Plan changes and prorations require careful testing
Limited payment gateway options vs Chargebee
best_when: Enterprise SaaS subscription billing with strong reporting
Companies needing strong OpenAPI spec and SDK support
When revenue recognition (ASC 606) automation is required
B2B subscriptions with invoicing and net terms
summary: Recurly is an enterprise subscription management platform. client = recurly.Client(api_key); client.create_subscription({account, plan_code}). Strong OpenAPI spec and SDK. Revenue recognition (ASC 606), dunning, usage-based billing, invoicing with net terms. Revenue share pricing (0.9% + flat fee). Strong enterprise reporting. Used by Box, Hubspot. Compare with Chargebee for gateway flexibility.
